'''Deylerax''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]], the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[near-Human]] [[Enu]] race.

==History==
It was infested by [[Stone mite/Legends|stone mites]] just prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], but the damage proved to be minimal before the mites were eradicated.

{{Planet-stub}}
